title: Per-Response Model Identity Disclosure in Frontier AI APIs: Cross-Vendor Comparison Data (June 2026)
description: Controlled comparison of per-response model identity disclosure across Google Gemini API and Anthropic Claude API. Google returns model_version and x-gemini-service-tier in every response (8/8 tests). Anthropic returns no equivalent fields (0/4 tests); response.model echoes the requested model without confirming the served model. Demonstrates that routing transparency is technically feasible and its absence is a design choice.
notes: Raw API responses (JSON, API keys redacted), capture scripts, and analysis. 12 tests total: 8 Gemini (Pro + Flash x 4 prompts) + 4 Claude (Sonnet 4.5 x 4 prompts). Incidental finding: Claude Sonnet 4.5 self-identifies as Claude 3.5 Sonnet (~20 months outdated).
